hero_headline: Empowering your home with simple, rapid tests.
hero_sub: Protect your family's health using everyday kitchen items. Detect food adulteration instantly.
trust_strip: Based on FSSAI DART Guidelines • Govt. of India
quick_test_title: Quick Test: Is your milk pure?
stat1_desc: Nearly 20% of tested food samples in India fail safety norms.
stat2_desc: Milk, spices, oils, and honey — the most adulterated items.
stat3_desc: Urea, detergents, heavy metals cause liver, kidney & digestive issues.
what_to_test: What do you want to test?
pick_item: Pick an item from your kitchen to test.
preliminary_note: For awareness only. Get samples tested at NABL-accredited labs.
fssai_authority: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India
made_with_love: Made with 🤍 for a healthier India
about_desc: FoodSniffer digitizes FSSAI's DART guidelines into easy, interactive home tests.
disclaimer: This app is for spreading awareness about food adulteration only. For reliable and confirmed results, ensure lab testing through NABL-accredited laboratories only.
content_disclaimer: Test procedures in this app are sourced from FSSAI's publicly available DART manual and compiled for easy reference. While every effort has been made to ensure accuracy, users should independently verify test procedures. This app is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially connected to FSSAI or any government body.
faq1_a: These tests are based on FSSAI's DART (Detect Adulteration with Rapid Testing) manual published by the Government of India.
faq2_a: No. FoodSniffer collects zero personal data. Everything runs on your device.
faq3_q: What should I do if a test fails?
faq3_a: Avoid consuming the product. Call FSSAI helpline 1800-180-5533 to report.
